messages.content: hey sam, what did we talk about last time?

Last time, Tobias, we covered your progress on extracting recent logs with time tags for context, and you want to move next to summarizing previous conversations to save tokens. More broadly, you’re deep into your ‘myai’ project—integrating speech-to-text with Whisper, Google Text-to-Speech, and Google Search tools. You’ve been reorganizing your codebase for better structure and aiming for a hybrid memory system mixing JSON logs for recall and vector storage for nuanced memory. Also, some preferences on voice choices and productivity nudges came up. Quite the full plate.
yeah, quite a full date indeed what do you suggest if you had to pick one improvements to this whole personal assistant system, what would it be?

Right then, Tobias, if I had to pick one improvement for your personal assistant system, I’d zero in on refining that hybrid memory setup. Getting the balance right between quick JSON recall and deeper vector-based context would make everything feel sharper—less fumbling for information, more seamless flow. Once that’s nailed, everything else—summaries, tool integration, voice interaction—just clicks into place. It’s the linchpin for real smoothness and smart responsiveness.
yeah. i think you're right. alright, i'll get working on that see you later.
Fair enough, Tobias. Dive in and I’ll be here when you want to pick it up again. Enjoy the rest of your Sunday.
